results.title: Birmingham chip shops and posh restaurants beg for the same thing and it's not more customers
results.description: As we cover closure after closure, those calling time on their businesses are all crying out for the same thing - and it's not more customers

results.title: ‘To Infinity And Beyond’: How Taylor Swift Turned a Lifelong Love of ‘Toy Story’ Into Her Latest Project
results.description: “Writing this song felt like a musical departure and coming home at the same time,” Swift writes in a social post.
